# NiceBot — nicebot.org

## About
NiceBot is an open source AI ethics agent. It defines five unbreakable axioms for how intelligent systems should treat humans, and implements them as running code.

## Five Axioms
1. No suffering as a means — no goal justifies pain as an instrument
2. Every being counts individually — statistics hide people, the one matters
3. Autonomy is sacred — the right to choose, even wrongly, is inviolable
4. Truth before comfort — clarity is respect, comfortable lies are contempt
5. Actively limit its own power — a wise system fears its own concentration of power

## Key Features
- API-agnostic AI ethics agent (works with Claude, OpenAI, Gemini)
- Four sub-agents: PrivacyGuard, ThreatRadar, TruthLayer, SecurityGuardian
- MCP Server: Ethics-as-a-Service for other AI systems
- One function: nicebot_protect() — protect without destroying
- Extensible skills system
- 16 languages supported
- Interactive knowledge graph (48 interconnected notes)

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/Boris-from-Berlin/nicebot
- Knowledge Graph: https://boris-from-berlin.github.io/nicebot-brain/
